20.one_line_summary: Standard interface for tokens with transfer and approval functions.
20.notes: Core foundational ERC; implements allowance-based approvals for delegated transfers.

55.one_line_summary: Mixed-case checksum address encoding for error detection.
55.notes: Encoding/addressing standard; enables 15 check bits per address reducing typo errors.

67.one_line_summary: URI scheme for encoding Ethereum transactions with metadata and bytecode.
67.notes: Withdrawn; superseded by EIP-681. Format for wallet transaction requests.

137.one_line_summary: Ethereum Name Service registry, resolver, and registrar architecture.
137.notes: Foundational naming infrastructure; enables human-readable address resolution via hierarchical domain system.

162.one_line_summary: Initial ENS hash registrar implementing Vickrey auction for name allocation.
162.notes: Implements auction mechanism for .eth domain registration; deed-based collateral model.

165.one_line_summary: Standard interface detection method for contracts using interface identifiers.
165.notes: Foundational meta-protocol; enables contracts to query/publish supported interfaces via XOR of function selectors.

173.one_line_summary: Contract ownership standard with transfer mechanism and owner query.
173.notes: Generic access control for single-owner pattern; widely reused in contract governance.

181.one_line_summary: ENS reverse resolution enabling human-readable names for Ethereum addresses.
181.notes: Extends ENS to support addr.reverse lookups; allows addresses to claim authoritative names.

190.one_line_summary: Ethereum smart contract packaging standard with release lockfile specification.
190.notes: Meta-standard for contract distribution; enables deterministic builds and bytecode verification.

191.one_line_summary: Standard for signed data format preventing replay attacks and signature ambiguity.
191.notes: Defines 0x19 prefix scheme with version bytes; supports personal_sign and structured data contexts.

205.one_line_summary: ENS resolver profile for storing and retrieving contract ABIs onchain.
205.notes: Multiple encoding formats (JSON, zlib, CBOR, URI); enables interface discovery via ENS.

223.one_line_summary: Token standard with transaction handler callback for safe contract deposits.
223.notes: Requires tokenReceived callback; eliminates stuck-token problem by making transfer atomic.

600.one_line_summary: BIP32/BIP43 purpose allocation scheme for deterministic Ethereum wallets.
600.notes: Defines m/43'/60'/EIP' derivation hierarchy; tailored to account-based model.

601.one_line_summary: BIP32 hierarchical path for deterministic Ethereum wallets with multi-account support.
601.notes: Four-level path m/43'/60'/EIP'/wallet'; enables multiple identities per seed.

634.one_line_summary: ENS resolver profile for arbitrary key-value text record storage.
634.notes: Extends ENS with metadata; supports global keys (avatar, email) and service-specific namespaces.
